feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S4HC Public -> SAC - Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads
entry.content:
Hello,

we would like to implement the Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads functionality in SAC based on ACDOCA table in S4HC Public, but even after reading what we could find on the internet, we are not able to make it work. Our settings:

SAC Model: Planning - New Model Type

S4HC Public Architecture: 2 Layer - QAS and PROD

Connection: SAP S/4HANA Acquire Connection

From these two articles (attached below) I have come to a conclussion, that we have to create an OData service from the ACDOCA table and create a OData connection to it in SAC and then it should work. Problem is, that in our 2 layer S4HC Public architecture, there is no DEV layer and therefore it is not possible to develop these kinds of things. In would only work in the 3 layer S4HC Public architecture.

Is my understanding correct or is there some other way that I have not found?

Thank you very much for any help!
Merry Christmas,

Adam

A Simple Guide to Exposing an oData Service from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to the SAP Business Technology Platform Using Developer Extensibility

Solved: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA Pu... - SAP Community

entry.title: Assign Product Type Group to a Purchasing Info Record
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are looking for a way to add the Product Type Group to a Purchasing Info Record.

Business Case: 

  • Within a Production Order an Operation is created.
  • This Operation uses a Purchasing Info Record. The Purchasing Info Record is not linked to a Material Number.
  • The Operation automatically creates a Purchase Requisition Item.
  • However, since the Purchase Requisition Item does not contain a specific Product Type Group, it is set automatically to 1 (Material).

For all Services this process is faulty, as we need a possibility to set the Product Type Group automatically to 2 (Service)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: No bank clearing account found in cash pool Error code FIBL_RPCODE065
entry.content:
• No bank clearing account defined for Cc. Bnk Acct. Pmt Mtd." is received when attempting to generate payment from the cash pool.
  • Error code FIBL_RPCODE065.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Product Hierarchy For Procurement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

On ME51N, I am trying to select a material using the Product Hierarchy function. When I click on the material match code and search for a product by Product Hierarchy, the system displays the nodes of the created and activated Product hierarchies but does not show any materials. The search result returns Zero.

Is there a step I'm missing?

What should I do te resolve this issue?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Amount field length extension in S4HC
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

Is it possible to extend the length of amount fields?

There a blogs about this feature in S4H, but I do not see the equivalent for S4H Cloud. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/amount-field-length-extension-afle-limitations-in-sap-s-4-hana/ba-p/13444049

Thank you,

Kind regards

Anaïs

entry.title: Mass change in maintain business roles
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there any option to mass change in maintain business roles in SAP Public Cloud?

My requirement is to maintain restrictions, such as plant, company code, and movement types, in bulk for multiple users at once. Currently, it takes too much time to update these restrictions individually for each user role.

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Update Client-Certificate change in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to update Client-Certificate change in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Test Tenant does not Exist in Export Customizing Transports App
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We already have our Test Tenant, and right now we are trying to export from Development/Customizing tenant to Test Tenant. We have two questions :

1. We learned that test tenant will not have own CBC, so CBC only for Development/Customizing tenant. Is it right ? 

2. When we want to choose the target, out test tenant are not available. Is it standard behavior? or we have some miss steps?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Apps for spool requests in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts!

Is is possible on S/4HANA Public Cloud (2408) to display or manage spool request? 

I am aiming to find the apps or functions equivalent to TCODE SP01 and SPAD in the private cloud.

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Need to change open Item Management and the Tax Category for some G/L account.
entry.content:
We are facing issues with Open Item Management and the Tax Category for some G/L account.

 

For the given G/L accounts in the attachments, Open Item Management is set to False and needs to be changed to True and also for some G/L accounts, the Tax Category needs to be changed.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Scope Confirmation time
entry.content:
Hi All,

its regarding the Scope Confirmation and Organisational Structure Phase.

We have completed the scope and Org structure definition and confirmed scope , 

its been 40 Hrs its still showing 90 Percent complete.

Any idea how much time it will take to complete the process in general.

Scope Items Selected - 252 .

Regards,

Asesh Kumar

entry.title: How do I read text from BP Role Customer from S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I must read the content from BP Role Customer and get text from Shipping Instructions for a given custom CDS view column that I´m creating now but when I try to use a wrapper class using the function module READ_TEXT it says it´s not permitted:

Is there any workaround for it please?

Thanks in advance,
Mauricio Predolim

entry.title: Custom fields, default values using screen persona in s4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, we are working on screen persona in S4 Hana Public Cloud. Here are few queries that we are facing

1. Is there any way we can default values like in VA01 screen set delivery block/billing block or anything that can be fixed for screen flavor

2. In some cases, e.g. for product master we have custom field extension possible using Manage Product app whereas that same custom field is not available in MM01/MM02/MM03. Is there any way to add this using screen persona?

3. Screen field validation - Is there any way to validate values entered on screen for a flavor without going for custom logic enhancements?

entry.title: Project WBS for CAPEX Budget Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Since SAP Public Cloud does not have internal orders, the capital expenditure process, which usually uses the internal order budget feature, now utilizes the WBS budget. However, during testing, the WBS budget could not control the budget even though postings to the asset were made. Does this mean the capital expenditure budget feature is no longer available in SAP Public Cloud? Below are the steps we have taken.

  1. Create WBS using Project control Enterprise project

 

  1. Release Project

 

  1. Input budget with apps manage budget document

100000024

 

  1. Project Budget Report

 

Butget already read in system, available for $ 6000

 

  1. Create Fixed Asset AUC

 

Already input WBS Element number as budget code

  1. Create PO and GR

PO Number 4500000118

 

As capture, asset number and WBS element already assigned, when GR also journal can created correctly

 

  1. Also create individual asset acquisition for asset 40000015

 

 

 

  1. Check on Project budget , our budget available still same, not reduce value of this transaction

 

Please help for budget capital expenditure solution on SAP Public Cloud 2408

entry.title: Budget for Cost Center Check On PR is Unavailable
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working with the budget for cost center. We already configure the budget availability control for cost center and it works perfectly on purchase order.

But the budget check does not work on purchase requisition. Is it standard behavior ? or there are some configuration that we missed?

Thank you!

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: In custom uploader there is no option to add the section code in the excel file.
entry.content:
In custom uploader there is no option to add the section code in the excel file(API:Journal Entry)

we assigned business place with section code in CBC, even though its not automatically picking section code at  invoice.(uploaded)

entry.title: Error message :Grouping has external number assignment. Please enter a valid number.
entry.content:
Error message :'Grouping has external number assignment. Please enter a valid number. ' While creating the Business Partner.

entry.title: Upload in app Post outgoing payment
entry.content:
Dear expert,

Could you please guide me on how to upload multiple documents when using the 'Post Outgoing Payment' app, instead of doing each document manually one by one?

Thanks and Best regards,

entry.title: Finding Data Source for Fiori Application Value Help in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I need guidance on identifying the data source of a Fiori application’s value help in the S/4HANA Public Cloud. My requirement is to enhance a standard F4 help in a Fiori application.

Could you please assist me in understanding how to locate this information?

Thank you.

Best regards,
Shankar

entry.title: How to create new condition tables for batch determination?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know how to create new condition tables for batch determination, and if it's possible to customize the selectable key fields.
Best regards.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
